title: What Will Be the Impact of Scrappage Policy on India’s EV Market?

summary.about: Whether India’s scrappage incentives will accelerate electric-vehicle adoption.
summary.audience: Vehicle buyers, EV manufacturers and transport-policy officials.
summary.method: Uses policy comparison, vehicle-market structure and consumer cost-benefit analysis.
summary.insights: The policy supports greener recovery but is likely to produce only a mild near-term EV sales increase because conventional alternatives remain competitive.
